title: Jim Cramer Says Semiconductor Stocks Are “Going Down.” Buy These 2 Dividend Stocks Instead
excerpt: Jim Cramer is flashing warning signs on semiconductor stocks and one high-flying AI name he says still has further to fall, but he sees two dividend stocks b...
content_html:
Quick Read

  • Cramer bought CLX for its 5% yield and 0.53 beta defensiveness, while warning NBIS, down 35% in one month, isn't done falling.

  • Cramer favored KO over COKE amid aluminum tariff margin pressure, while PWR's record $48.5B backlog could reward patient buyers after a 12% pullback.

  • Cramer urged waiting on all semiconductor stocks until margin-driven forced selling clears, saying the bottom isn't visible yet.

  • Don't wait: the analyst who called NVIDIA in 2010 just revealed his top 10 AI stocks. See the full list FREE now.

Jim Cramer believes forced selling is creating opportunities, but investors should resist buying too early. During his July 17, 2026, Mad Money Lightning Round, he recommended two defensive dividend stocks while urging patience on semiconductors and highly speculative names. His message was simple: "The speculative hands are being margined out. They're going to get rid of them, and you'll get a better price if you want to buy."

Wait to Buy Semiconductors Until the Margin Sellers Are Gone

On a caller's semiconductor question, Cramer advised being patient: "It's a semiconductor and all semiconductor stocks are going down. May I suggest that you wait a few more days until we get rid of all the margin players, and you're going to find a bottom. I don't see it yet."

NVIDIA (NASDAQ:NVDA) fundamentals remain intact. Q1 FY2027 delivered $81.61B in revenue, up 85.2% YoY, with Data Center revenue of $75.25B. But Polymarket assigns only a 60.5% probability that NVDA closes above $200 by end of July and just 37% above $210. Reddit sentiment fell into bearish territory (scores 32 to 46) July 7 through 9 on DeepSeek chip news and server delay reports.

Don't wait: the analyst who called NVIDIA in 2010 just revealed his top 10 AI stocks. See the full list FREE now.

Cramer Warns Nebius Is "Not Done Going Down"

Cramer's sharpest warning targeted Nebius Group (NASDAQ:NBIS): "It is at the nexus of the craziness right now. There are a lot of hedge funds that own it, and I think they're in a lot of trouble. This stock is not done going down. There'll be another time to buy it, but that time is not now."

Shares fell 35.21% over the past month and 20.55% in the past week, closing at $171.77 on July 16. Fundamentals are strong (Q2 revenue of $399M, up 279.6% YoY, an NVIDIA $2B pre-funded warrant investment, and a $12B Meta contract), but shares trade at 57.7x sales and 68x forward earnings.

Cramer Says Clorox's 5% Yield Is Finally Worth Buying

Cramer's headline call was on Clorox (NYSE:CLX). "I read my first positive note about Clorox in a great deal of time today. That was a price target increase that made me say 5% yield. You know what? We want to buy it."

content_html_zh:
快速阅读

  • Cramer 因其 5% 的收益率和 0.53 beta 的防御性而购买了 CLX，同时警告 NBIS 在一个月内下跌了 35%，其下跌趋势尚未结束。
  • 由于铝关税利润压力，Cramer 更青睐 KO，而不是 COKE，而 PWR 创纪录的 $48.5B 积压订单可能会在回调 12% 后奖励耐心的买家。
  • 克莱默敦促等待所有半导体股票，直到利润驱动的强制抛售清除，并表示尚未看到底部。
  • 不要等待：2010 年给 NVIDIA 打电话的分析师刚刚透露了他最喜欢的 10 只人工智能股票。 立即免费查看完整列表。

吉姆·克莱默 (Jim Cramer) 认为，强制抛售正在创造机会，但投资者不应过早买入。 在 2026 年 7 月 17 日的 Mad Money Lightning Round 中，他推荐了两只防御性股息股​​票，同时敦促对半导体和高度投机性股票保持耐心。 他的信息很简单：“投机者正在被边缘化。 他们会处理掉它们，如果你想买，你会得到更好的价格。”

等到保证金卖家消失后再购买半导体

对于来电者提出的半导体问题，克莱默建议保持耐心：“这是半导体，所有半导体股票都在下跌。 我建议您再等几天，直到我们摆脱所有的利润玩家，然后您就会找到底部。 我还没看到。”

NVIDIA（纳斯达克股票代码：NVDA）的基本面保持不变。 2027 财年第一季度收入为 $81.61B，同比增长 85.2%，其中数据中心收入为 $75.25B。 但 Polymarket 认为 NVDA 到 7 月底收盘价高于 200 美元的可能性只有 60.5%，高于 210 美元的可能性只有 37%。 7 月 7 日至 9 日，由于 DeepSeek 芯片新闻和服务器延迟报告，Reddit 情绪跌入看跌区域（得分为 32 至 46）。

不要等待：2010 年给 NVIDIA 打电话的分析师刚刚透露了他最喜欢的 10 只人工智能股票。 立即免费查看完整列表。

克莱默警告尼比乌斯“还没有结束”

克莱默对 Nebius 集团（纳斯达克股票代码：NBIS）发出最尖锐的警告：“现在正处于疯狂的关键时刻。 有很多对冲基金拥有它，我认为他们遇到了很多麻烦。 这只股票还没有继续下跌。 还会有另一个时间来购买它，但那个时间不是现在。”

该股过去一个月下跌 35.21%，过去一周下跌 20.55%，7 月 16 日收于 171.77 美元。 基本面强劲（第二季度收入为 3.99 亿美元，同比增长 279.6%，NVIDIA 预资助 20 亿美元认股权证投资，以及 120 亿美元 Meta 合约），但股价交易价格为销售额的 57.7 倍，预期收益为 68 倍。

克莱默表示高乐氏 5% 的收益率最终值得购买

克莱默的头条新闻是关于高乐氏（Clorox）（纽约证券交易所股票代码：CLX）。 “今天，我花了很长时间读到了关于 Clorox 的第一篇正面评论。 这是价格目标的提高，让我说收益率为 5%。 你知道吗？ 我们想买它。”
